title: View permission
excerpt: I made some view modes for convenience to see. But, sometimes, such views was deleted by some subscribers. I need “permission” to delete or add the view as “column permission” feature

posts.author: DinhHuy (Dinh Quang Huy)
posts.cookedHtml: I made some view modes for convenience to see. But, sometimes, such views was deleted by some subscribers. I need “permission” to delete or add the view as “column permission” feature

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@DinhHuy

If you change the board permissions to “edit content” instead of the default “edit everything” only owners will be able to delete views:

image801×548 30.1 KB

Jim - The Monday Man channel
Signup for a FREE Integromat account with this link and get a FREE hour with The Monday Man

posts.author: DinhHuy (Dinh Quang Huy)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
I follow as your guidance, but member still can delete the view.

Vào Th 6, 8 thg 10, 2021 vào lúc 18:28 Jim - The Monday Man via monday Community <monday@discoursemail.com> đã viết:

View still can be deleted.png1366×768 157 KB

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@DinhHuy

If the user is not set to an owner on the board, this should not be happening. If you can confirm that the user is not an owner, I would recommend contacting monday support at support@monday.com.

Jim

posts.author: DinhHuy (Dinh Quang Huy)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Jim,Of course, these members are not owners

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@DinhHuy

I was wrong. I tested this and checked the documentation. The ability to delete views is not restricted until the next level down, “Edit content only in items assigned to them in a People column(s)”. Sorry about that. For what it’s worth, I think this setting should be changed.

posts.author: DinhHuy (Dinh Quang Huy)
posts.cookedHtml:
I do as you guide. I’m only owner. Other member still can delete (file attached).
Board is main board

image.png1366×768 114 KB
image.png1366×768 132 KB

Vào Th 6, 8 thg 10, 2021 vào lúc 18:28 Jim - The Monday Man via monday Community <monday@discoursemail.com> đã viết:

Other member can delete.png1366×768 137 KB

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml: It does appear that the current permissions have a bug. If a user only has edit content not edit everything they should not be able to delete or save views. (though they should be able to edit them, just not save the view permanently. So they can always “Reset” the view back to its saved state.)

posts.author: yossir.rousso (Yossi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Noticed this and was compelled to add a comment that this issue is now resolved by the ability to ‘Lock’ views, possible only by board owners. When a view is locked, non board owners cannot delete it or change its settings.
You’re wellcome!
